prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年浙江省综合类最低录取位次分别为约331名、307名、312名、468名、343名。整体波动较大：2021–2023年稳定在307–331名之间，2024年大幅后移至4                        68名（较2023年后移156名），2025年又回升至343名。近5年位次均值约352名，2025年基准位次约343名，处于历史中位偏优水平；该校在浙江省综合类招生计                         划：2021年9人，2022–2025年均为10人，2026年大幅扩招至18人，较2025年增加8人，扩幅达80%。显著扩招将稀释竞争集中度，按供需弹性原理，位次数字预                        计明显后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 复旦大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2021年第6名、2022–2026年连续稳居第5名，属于全国顶尖高校（Top5），综                         合实力与声誉极强，对高分考生有持续吸引力；2026年声誉评价偏负面（14件事件中5件负面、9件中性），主要涉及师德师风与学校管理类舆情，但无重大断档                        或投档异常信号；2025年声誉偏正面（新闻传播学获评A++等级）。抖音热度总排名第4（高热），视频数19条，综合热度超1074万，显示该校在短视频平台关注度极高，报考热度                        不减；第五轮学科评估中，复旦大学A-及以上学科共27个，其中A+学科11个（中国史、中国语言文学、公共卫生与预防医学、哲学、政治学、数学、新闻传播学                        、物理学、理论经济学、生物学、马克思主义理论），A学科10个，A-学科6个。顶尖学科覆盖文、理、医、工、社科全领域，对考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年                        专业热度数据显示，计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程、临床医学、口腔医学等为高热推荐专业，与复旦大学优势学科高度契合。浙江省考生总数从2025年约29.1万增至2026                         年约40万（增长37.6%），竞争显著加剧。；复旦大学位于上海市，与浙江省地理相邻，交通便利，历来是浙江高分考生的                         热门选择。该校在本省（上海）招生占比约10–12%，在浙江省招生占比约1.2–1.5%，属跨省招生中占比中等的省份，无明显地域偏好变化。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合以上因素：2025                        年基准位次343名，2026年计划大幅扩招80%（从10人增至18人）是推动位次后移的最关键因素，按供需弹性计算位次后移约165名至508名；同时浙江省考生总数增长37.6%加剧竞                         争，但复旦大学作为顶尖名校的持续高关注度（抖音高热排名第4）和强大优势学科吸引力部分对冲了扩招带来的位次后移压力。综合权衡后，预测2026年最低录取位次约508名，                        波动区间450–566名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 理科试验班（相辉学堂相辉计划）（含数学与应用数学、物理学、化学、生物科学）
- 工科试验班（相辉学堂香农计划）（含集成电路科学与工程、人工智能、智能科学与技术等）
- 经济学类（含经济学、金融学、国际经济与贸易等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（具身智能机器人班）（含智能科学与技术）
- 工科试验班（未来信息领军人才班）（含电子信息科学与技术）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 人文科学试验班（含中国语言文学类、历史学类、哲学类、经济学类、法学、新闻传播学类等）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年复旦大学在浙江省综合类大幅扩招至18人，预测最低位次约508名（区间450–566名）。建议位次在450名以内的考生可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（相辉学堂、经济学类）；位                        次在450–508名之间的考生以二档工科试验班为主攻方向，同时可冲一档；位次在508–566名之间的考生以三档人文科学试验班为稳妥选择，同时可冲二档。位次超过566名的考生                         报考风险较大，建议谨慎考虑。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for comprehensive subjects in Zhejiang Province were approximately 331, 307, 312, 468, and 343 respectively. Overall, there was significant fluctuation: stable between 307 and 331 from 2021 to 2023, a sharp drop to 468 in 2024 (156 places lower than 2023), and a rebound to 343 in 2025. The average ranking over the past five years is about 352, with the 2025 baseline ranking around 343, which is above the historical median. The university's enrollment plan for comprehensive subjects in Zhejiang Province: 9 students in 2021, 10 students each year from 2022 to 2025, and a significant expansion to 18 students in 2026, an increase of 8 students compared to 2025, representing an 80% expansion. This substantial expansion will dilute competition concentration, and according to the principle of supply-demand elasticity, the ranking number is expected to drop significantly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Fudan University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 6th in 2021 and consistently 5th from 2022 to 2026, making it a top-tier national university (Top 5) with extremely strong comprehensive strength and reputation, continuously attracting high-scoring students. In 2026, the reputation evaluation was slightly negative (5 negative and 9 neutral out of 14 events), mainly involving teacher ethics and school management public opinion, but with no major disruptions or abnormal admission signals. In 2025, the reputation was positive (Journalism and Communication rated A++). On Douyin, it ranked 4th in overall popularity (high heat), with 19 videos and a comprehensive popularity of over 10.74 million, indicating extremely high attention on short video platforms and undiminished application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Fudan University had 27 disciplines rated A- or above, including 11 A+ disciplines (Chinese History, Chinese Language and Literature, Public Health and Preventive Medicine, Philosophy, Political Science, Mathematics, Journalism and Communication, Physics, Theoretical Economics, Biology, Marxist Theory), 10 A disciplines, and 6 A- disciplines. Top disciplines cover the full spectrum of arts, sciences, medicine, engineering, and social sciences, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows that computer science, electronics/communication, electrical engineering, clinical medicine, and stomatology are highly recommended majors, closely aligned with Fudan University's advantageous disciplines. The total number of candidates in Zhejiang Province increased from approximately 291,000 in 2025 to about 400,000 in 2026 (a 37.6% increase), significantly intensifying competition. Fudan University is located in Shanghai, geographically adjacent to Zhejiang Province with convenient transportation, and has historically been a popular choice for high-scoring candidates from Zhejiang. The university's enrollment proportion in its own province (Shanghai) is about 10–12%, while in Zhejiang Province it is about 1.2–1.5%, making it a moderately proportioned province for cross-provincial enrollment, with no obvious regional preference changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering all factors: the 2025 baseline ranking is 343, and the 2026 plan for a significant 80% expansion (from 10 to 18 students) is the most critical factor driving the ranking downward. According to supply-demand elasticity, the ranking is expected to drop by about 165 places to 508. At the same time, the 37.6% increase in the total number of candidates in Zhejiang Province intensifies competition, but Fudan University's sustained high attention as a top prestigious school (4th in Douyin popularity) and strong advantageous disciplines partially offset the downward pressure from expansion. After comprehensive weighing, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 508, with a fluctuation range of 450–566.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Science Experimental Class (Xianghui Academy Xianghui Plan) (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Biological Science)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Xianghui Academy Shannon Plan) (including Integrated Circuit Science and Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, Intelligent Science and Technology, etc.)
- Economics Class (including Economics, Finance, International Economics and Trade, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Embodied Intelligent Robot Class) (including Intelligent Science and Technology)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information Leading Talent Class) (including Electronic Information Science and Technology)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class (including Chinese Language and Literature, History, Philosophy, Economics, Law, Journalism and Communication, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Fudan University significantly expanded its comprehensive enrollment in Zhejiang Province to 18 students, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 508 (range 450–566). It is recommended that candidates with rankings within 450 focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Xianghui Academy, Economics Class); candidates with rankings between 450 and 508 target Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Classes as the main direction, while also attempting Tier 1; candidates with rankings between 508 and 566 choose Tier 3 Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class as a safe option, while also attempting Tier 2. Candidates with rankings above 566 face higher risk and should consider carefully.
